type.description: One of: string, date, datetime, integer, decimal, boolean, uri, geojson_geometry, or concept:{ConceptId}

domain_override.description: Explicit domain namespace override. Set to null to force universal URI, or to a domain code (e.g. 'sp') to force domain-specific URI, regardless of which concepts use this property.

schema_org_equivalent.description: schema.org equivalent property as a CURIE (e.g. 'schema:givenName'). Used to generate camelCase aliases in the JSON-LD context.

sensitivity.description: How sensitive this property is in most deployment contexts. standard (default, can be omitted): no special handling. sensitive: reveals circumstances (health, poverty, victimhood) in most contexts. restricted: should not appear in credentials at routine service points.

system_mappings.description: Mappings showing how external system values correspond to this property's values

external_equivalents.description: Mappings to equivalent classes or properties in external ontologies (e.g. SEMIC Core Vocabularies)

label.description: Human-readable name in the external ontology

uri.description: Full URI of the equivalent in the external ontology

match.description: Semantic match quality: exact (same meaning), close (similar with minor differences), broad (overlapping scope), name_match (same name but unverified semantics)

vocabulary.description: Which vocabulary or ontology module this comes from (e.g. 'Core Person', 'CCCEV')

note.description: Semantic rationale for the match quality, especially for close or broad matches

vocabulary_name.description: Name the external system uses for this field or vocabulary

unmapped_canonical.description: Canonical values not covered by this system

code.description: Identifier used in the external system

maps_to.description: Canonical property value, or null if no equivalent

unmapped_reason.description: Why this system value has no canonical equivalent. Required when maps_to is null.
